title: moogs_structures:legacy_ocean_bottom_single_pool_element
description: A single pool element that ignores structure blocks and air when placed, for use with ocean-bottom structures that need legacy placement behaviour.

location.description: Namespaced resource location pointing to the NBT structure file (e.g. 'mymod:ocean/ruin').

processors.description: Processor list applied to the structure template. Follows vanilla single_pool_element processor list format.

projection.description: How the structure is placed relative to terrain.
